notes:
• People & Connections (Matter menu, ⌥⌘P): the case people as a graph — who is connected with whom, labelled arrows, automatic hierarchy, coloured by side.
• Export the dramatis personae as CSV — people, particulars, connections and linked documents.
• The inspector's People tab now also shows who is MENTIONED in the document's text — one click links them.
• Plus: convert beta licences to full licences in the management console.
